topic: Self-updating file registry with tags + upstream/downstream graph + JASON-OS portability tracking
agentBreakdown: 8 searchers (D1-D8) + 1 synthesizer + 2 verifiers (V1-V2) + 1 contrarian + 1 OTB + 1 cross-model (Gemini)
claimCountNote: 116 records enumerated in claims.jsonl (C-001..C-116). RESEARCH_OUTPUT.md Section 10.5 post-challenge v1.1 narrative total is 120 = 116 + 4 UNVERIFIED challenger additions discussed in Section 10 but not individually enumerated as JSONL records.
schemaNote: claims.jsonl uses fields {id, text, confidence, source_url, source_agent, sub_question} and sources.jsonl uses {id, url, title, trust_level, domain, agent}. This predates the canonical deep-research JSONL schema documented in .claude/skills/deep-research/REFERENCE.md (claim/evidence/sourceIds/trustLevel/craapScore). Bundle ported copy-as-is from SoNash for audit integrity; field mapping: text→claim, source_url→sourceUrl (can be derived from sources.jsonl via source_agent lookup), trust_level→trustLevel. Converting 222 records is deferred until a JSONL consumer exists in JASON-OS (tracked as debt entry).
topThemes: No composite tool satisfies all five criteria simultaneously — custom thin build required
@optave/codegraph (March 2026) is the best single primitive covering graph + watch + multi-repo
Portability classification schema (scope: universal/user/project/machine/ephemeral) is novel and immediately actionable
KuzuDB abandoned Oct 2025 — affects CodeGraphContext and any custom build using KuzuDB on Windows
MCP protocol cannot push change events between turns — watcher daemon + SQLite + MCP poll is the viable architecture

80+ JASON-OS memory files are auto-classifiable by filename prefix heuristic with HIGH confidence (V1 verification corrected the v1.0 count of 44; memory tree grew 44→80+ in the 18 days preceding 2026-04-17)
recommendation: Option D — minimum-viable JSONL + PostToolUse hook + scope-tags
keyNegativeFindings: No single tool combines file-graph + user-defined tags + self-update + cross-project + solo-Windows
No tool tracks file portability provenance across projects
No academic or industry standard portability schema exists for files/skills
MCP protocol fundamentally cannot push change events between Claude turns
keyPositiveFindings: Obsidian+FolderBridge+Breadcrumbs+Dataview satisfies 4 of 5 criteria for .md-based skill/agent docs
@parcel/watcher getEventsSince snapshot pattern is ideal for session-start change detection on Windows
D7 scope enum has implicit consensus across 5 independent systems (chezmoi, VSCode, Nx, XDG, Agent Skills)
JASON-OS memory file naming convention already implicitly encodes portability scope
risksAndCaveats: KuzuDB abandoned Oct 2025 — avoid CodeGraphContext on Windows
obsidian-skill-graph is April 2026 v0.1.0 — visual only, not production query layer
Obsidian v0.9.1 blocked symlinks outside vault — FolderBridge required, old tutorials broken
Chokidar v5 ESM-only — use v4 for mixed CJS/ESM codebases
